description: Composition Turquoise blue high neck jacket made of 100% polyester, has a full length zipper with mesh panels across the arms, patented adidas 3-Stripes below the panel, elasticated at the hemline and cuffs and branding on left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not dry clean Do not iron directly on print/trims/ logo Look every bit stunning in this neon blue track jacket from adidas. Featuring the patented Adidas 3-Stripes, this jacket has a touch of gravity. On a windy day, top it over your regular shirt or t-shirt, and on warmer days simply work out in the jacket, flaunting your well toned arms in style. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6.1'', Chest- 38.5”
